title: taraxacum atomatum
intro:
I'm sorry, but I couldn't find information about a plant called "Taraxacum atomatum." 

However, I can tell you about Taraxacum officinale, also known as the common dandelion, which is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is a perennial herb that grows to 2-3 feet in height, with jagged leaves and bright yellow flowers. Taraxacum officinale has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. It is used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and liver and kidney problems, and is also used as a herbal tea and in capsule form.
